headline: 3 Consumer Stocks We Keep Off Our Radar
summary: The performance of consumer discretionary businesses is closely linked to economic cycles. Lately, it seems like demand trends have worked in their favor as the industry has returned 7.5% over the past six months, similar to the S&P 500.
